title: Arcane Caches
description: Adds rare structures with endgame+ loot to the world.
body:
This is a first release data pack, created to get the idea out of my head. While it has been tested for funcionality, the game mechanics it adds may not be properly balanced 
yet. Constructive feedback on the balance is appreciated.

This data pack adds rare structures with endgame+ loot, beyond what's obtainable in vanilla survival to the world. Occasional random encounters with custom wandering traders offering explorer maps to the nearest structure are also generated.

<details>
<summary>Notes For Use</summary>
  
1. This data pack is best installed before initial world generation. The vanilla world generation only adds structures to newly generated chunks. Due to the rarity of the structures, significant new exploration may be required to produce structures on established worlds.

2. This data pack contains loot tables that use luck modifiers. If used with other data packs/plugins/mods that allow players to acquire elevated luck attributes, overly generous loot will be generated.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Notes For Multi-Player</summary>
  
1. Use in a multi-player environment was anticipated during development. While rare, structure generation should be frequent enough that players can reasonably locate new ones in the late game. All random events are unique per player.

2. If installed on a server where the world seed is known, server owners may want to modify the salt values of the structure set files located in 'data/arcane_caches/worldgen/structure_set/' to prevent players installing this datapack on a single player world to locate the structures.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Feedback</summary>
Feedback can be sent to arcane.caches@mrdrkn.net; include the word 'alpaca' in the subject line.
</details>
